source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
Fig. 8.1 shows a 12.0 V power supply connected in a circuit.

The rating of the lamp at normal brightness is $6.0 \mathrm{~V}, 9.0 \mathrm{~W}$.
Calculate
the resistance of the lamp at normal brightness.
